description: Initial execution result for task task4

data.task_objective: Develop the Candidate Evaluation & Scoring Logic: analyze candidate responses for relevance, depth, confidence, and technical accuracy; compute composite scores across defined categories.
data.context:
Task task0:
  Objective: Define the database schema for job descriptions, candidate resumes, interview sessions, AI-generated questions, candidate responses, evaluation scores, email logs, and final reports.
  Result: ```json
{
  "schemas": {
    "job_descriptions": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "job_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the job description",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "title": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Job title"
        },
        "description": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Full job description text"
        },
        "requirements": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Job requirements"
        },
        "responsibilities": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Job responsibilities"
        },
        "department": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Department the job belongs to"
        },
        "location": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Job location"
        },
        "date_posted": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date",
          "description": "Date the job was posted"
        },
        "embedding": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "number"
          },
          "description": "Vector embedding of the job description"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "job_id",
        "title",
        "description"
      ]
    },
    "candidate_resumes": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "candidate_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the candidate",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "name": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's full name"
        },
        "email": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's email address"
        },
        "phone": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's phone number"
        },
        "resume_text": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Full text of the candidate's resume"
        },
        "skills": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "description": "List of skills extracted from the resume"
        },
        "experience": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's work experience"
        },
        "education": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's education details"
        },
        "embedding": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "number"
          },
          "description": "Vector embedding of the resume"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "candidate_id",
        "name",
        "email",
        "resume_text"
      ]
    },
    "interview_sessions": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the interview session",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "candidate_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing candidate_resumes"
        },
        "job_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing job_descriptions"
        },
        "start_time": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the interview started"
        },
        "end_time": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the interview ended"
        },
        "status": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "scheduled",
            "in_progress",
            "completed",
            "cancelled"
          ],
          "description": "Status of the interview session"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "session_id",
        "candidate_id",
        "job_id",
        "start_time"
      ]
    },
    "ai_generated_questions": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "question_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the question",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing interview_sessions"
        },
        "question_text": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The text of the question generated by AI"
        },
        "question_type": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "technical",
            "behavioral",
            "follow_up"
          ],
          "description": "Type of question"
        },
        "expected_answer": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The expected answer or keywords for the question"
        },
         "topic": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Topic of the question"
        },
        "difficulty": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": ["easy", "medium", "hard"],
          "description": "Difficulty level of the question"
         }
      },
      "required": [
        "question_id",
        "session_id",
        "question_text",
        "question_type"
      ]
    },
    "candidate_responses": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "response_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the response",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing interview_sessions"
        },
        "question_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing ai_generated_questions"
        },
        "response_text": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The candidate's answer to the question"
        },
        "timestamp": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the response was recorded"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "response_id",
        "session_id",
        "question_id",
        "response_text"
      ]
    },
    "evaluation_scores": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "score_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the score",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing interview_sessions"
        },
         "question_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing ai_generated_questions"
        },
        "category": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "relevance",
            "depth",
            "confidence",
            "technical_accuracy",
            "communication_skills",
            "problem_solving"
          ],
          "description": "Category being evaluated"
        },
        "score": {
          "type": "number",
          "description": "Score for the category (e.g., 1-5 scale)"
        },
        "justification": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Explanation or justification for the score"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "score_id",
        "session_id",
        "category",
        "score"
      ]
    },
    "email_logs": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "email_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the email",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "candidate_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing candidate_resumes"
        },
        "email_type": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "invitation",
            "follow_up",
            "rejection",
            "offer"
          ],
          "description": "Type of email"
        },
        "subject": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Email subject"
        },
        "body": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Email body text"
        },
        "timestamp": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the email was sent"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "email_id",
        "candidate_id",
        "email_type",
        "subject",
        "body",
        "timestamp"
      ]
    },
    "final_reports": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "report_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the final report",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "candidate_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing candidate_resumes"
        },
        "job_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing job_descriptions"
        },
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing interview_sessions"
        },
        "resume_job_match_analysis": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Analysis of how well the resume matches the job description"
        },
        "interview_summary": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Summary of the interview session"
        },
        "technical_assessment": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Assessment of the candidate's technical skills"
        },
        "behavioral_assessment": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Assessment of the candidate's behavioral traits"
        },
        "strengths": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "List of the candidate's strengths"
        },
        "weaknesses": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "List of the candidate's weaknesses"
        },
        "final_recommendation": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Final recommendation (e.g., hire, no hire, further review)"
        },
        "overall_score": {
          "type": "number",
          "description": "Overall score for the candidate"
        },
        "scoring_breakdown": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Detailed breakdown of the scoring across different categories (JSON format)"
        },
         "report_generation_date": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the report was generated"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "report_id",
        "candidate_id",
        "job_id",
        "session_id"
      ]
    }
  }
}
```
Task task1:
  Objective: Design the RESTful API specification (endpoints, request/response models) for core operations: ingesting jobs/resumes, orchestrating interviews, submitting responses, scoring, emailing, and retrieving reports.
  Result: ```yaml
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: AI-Driven Interview and Candidate Evaluation System API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: RESTful API for managing jobs, resumes, interviews, evaluations, and reports.

paths:
  /jobs:
    post:
      summary: Ingest a new job description
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                job_title:
                  type: string
                  description: Title of the job
                job_description:
                  type: string
                  description: Detailed description of the job
                department:
                  type: string
                  description: Department for the job
                location:
                  type: string
                  description: Job location
                skills:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                  description: List of required skills
              example:
                job_title: Software Engineer
                job_description: Develop and maintain software applications.  Experience with Python and Javascript required.
                department: Engineering
                location: New York, NY
                skills: [Python, Javascript, React, AWS]
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Job created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  job_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the job
                example:
                  job_id: job123
        '400':
          description: Invalid request

    get:
      summary: Retrieve a list of all jobs
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of jobs retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    job_id:
                      type: string
                      description: Unique identifier for the job
                    job_title:
                      type: string
                      description: Title of the job
                    job_description:
                      type: string
                      description: Detailed description of the job
                    department:
                      type: string
                      description: Department for the job
                    location:
                      type: string
                      description: Job location
                    skills:
                      type: array
                      items:
                        type: string
                      description: List of required skills
                  example:
                    job_id: job123
                    job_title: Software Engineer
                    job_description: Develop and maintain software applications.  Experience with Python and Javascript required.
                    department: Engineering
                    location: New York, NY
                    skills: [Python, Javascript, React, AWS]

  /jobs/{job_id}:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve a specific job by ID
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: job_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the job
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Job retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  job_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the job
                  job_title:
                    type: string
                    description: Title of the job
                  job_description:
                    type: string
                    description: Detailed description of the job
                  department:
                    type: string
                    description: Department for the job
                  location:
                    type: string
                    description: Job location
                  skills:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of required skills
                example:
                  job_id: job123
                  job_title: Software Engineer
                  job_description: Develop and maintain software applications.  Experience with Python and Javascript required.
                  department: Engineering
                  location: New York, NY
                  skills: [Python, Javascript, React, AWS]
        '404':
          description: Job not found

  /resumes:
    post:
      summary: Ingest a new candidate resume
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                candidate_name:
                  type: string
                  description: Name of the candidate
                resume_text:
                  type: string
                  description: Text content of the resume
                email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                  description: Candidate's email address
                skills:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                  description: List of skills extracted from the resume
              example:
                candidate_name: John Doe
                resume_text: Experienced software engineer with Python and Javascript skills.
                email: john.doe@example.com
                skills: [Python, Javascript, SQL]
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Resume created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  resume_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the resume
                example:
                  resume_id: resume456
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
    get:
      summary: Retrieve a list of all resumes
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of resumes retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    resume_id:
                      type: string
                      description: Unique identifier for the resume
                    candidate_name:
                      type: string
                      description: Name of the candidate
                    resume_text:
                      type: string
                      description: Text content of the resume
                    email:
                      type: string
                      format: email
                      description: Candidate's email address
                    skills:
                      type: array
                      items:
                        type: string
                      description: List of skills extracted from the resume
                  example:
                    resume_id: resume456
                    candidate_name: John Doe
                    resume_text: Experienced software engineer with Python and Javascript skills.
                    email: john.doe@example.com
                    skills: [Python, Javascript, SQL]

  /resumes/{resume_id}:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve a specific resume by ID
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: resume_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the resume
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Resume retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  resume_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the resume
                  candidate_name:
                    type: string
                    description: Name of the candidate
                  resume_text:
                    type: string
                    description: Text content of the resume
                  email:
                    type: string
                    format: email
                    description: Candidate's email address
                  skills:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of skills extracted from the resume
                example:
                  resume_id: resume456
                  candidate_name: John Doe
                  resume_text: Experienced software engineer with Python and Javascript skills.
                  email: john.doe@example.com
                  skills: [Python, Javascript, SQL]
        '404':
          description: Resume not found

  /interviews:
    post:
      summary: Start a new interview session
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                job_id:
                  type: string
                  description: ID of the job for the interview
                resume_id:
                  type: string
                  description: ID of the candidate's resume
              example:
                job_id: job123
                resume_id: resume456
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Interview session started successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  interview_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the interview session
                  first_question:
                    type: string
                    description: The first question to ask the candidate
                example:
                  interview_id: interview789
                  first_question: "Tell me about your experience with Python."
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '404':
          description: Job or Resume not found

  /interviews/{interview_id}/questions:
    get:
      summary: Get the current or next question in the interview
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Question retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  question:
                    type: string
                    description: The question to ask the candidate
                example:
                  question: "Explain the difference between '==' and '===' in Javascript."
        '404':
          description: Interview not found

  /interviews/{interview_id}/responses:
    post:
      summary: Submit a candidate's response to a question
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                question:
                  type: string
                  description: The question being answered.
                response:
                  type: string
                  description: The candidate's answer to the question
              example:
                question: "Explain the difference between '==' and '===' in Javascript."
                response: "'==' compares values, while '===' compares values and types."
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Response submitted successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  next_question:
                    type: string
                    nullable: true
                    description: The next question to ask, or null if the interview is complete
                  evaluation:
                    type: object
                    description: Evaluation of the response
                    properties:
                      relevance:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Relevance score (0-1)
                      depth:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Depth score (0-1)
                      confidence:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Confidence score (0-1)
                      technical_accuracy:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Technical accuracy score (0-1)
                    example:
                      relevance: 0.9
                      depth: 0.8
                      confidence: 0.7
                      technical_accuracy: 0.95
                example:
                  next_question: "How would you optimize a slow SQL query?"
                  evaluation:
                    relevance: 0.9
                    depth: 0.8
                    confidence: 0.7
                    technical_accuracy: 0.95
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '404':
          description: Interview not found

  /interviews/{interview_id}/scores:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve the candidate's scores for the interview
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Scores retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  technical_score:
                    type: number
                    format: float
                    description: Overall technical score
                  behavioral_score:
                    type: number
                    format: float
                    description: Overall behavioral score
                  overall_score:
                    type: number
                    format: float
                    description: Overall score
                  category_scores:
                    type: object
                    description: Scores for individual categories
                    properties:
                      problem_solving:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Problem-solving score
                      communication:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Communication score
                    example:
                      problem_solving: 0.85
                      communication: 0.9
                example:
                  technical_score: 0.8
                  behavioral_score: 0.9
                  overall_score: 0.85
                  category_scores:
                    problem_solving: 0.85
                    communication: 0.9
        '404':
          description: Interview not found

  /emails/invite:
    post:
      summary: Generate and send an interview invitation email
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                candidate_email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                  description: Candidate's email address
                job_title:
                  type: string
                  description: Job title
                interview_date:
                  type: string
                  format: date-time
                  description: Date and time of the interview
                interviewer_name:
                  type: string
                  description: Name of the interviewer
              example:
                candidate_email: john.doe@example.com
                job_title: Software Engineer
                interview_date: "2024-01-20T10:00:00Z"
                interviewer_name: Jane Smith
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Email sent successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  message:
                    type: string
                    description: Confirmation message
                example:
                  message: "Interview invitation email sent to john.doe@example.com"
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '500':
          description: Email sending failed

  /emails/followup:
    post:
      summary: Generate and send a follow-up email to the candidate
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                candidate_email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                  description: Candidate's email address
                interview_id:
                  type: string
                  description: Interview ID
              example:
                candidate_email: john.doe@example.com
                interview_id: interview789
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Email sent successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  message:
                    type: string
                    description: Confirmation message
                example:
                  message: "Follow-up email sent to john.doe@example.com"
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '500':
          description: Email sending failed

  /reports/{interview_id}:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve the final candidate evaluation report
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Report retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  resume_job_match_analysis:
                    type: string
                    description: Analysis of how well the resume matches the job description
                  interview_summary:
                    type: string
                    description: Summary of the interview
                  technical_assessment:
                    type: string
                    description: Assessment of the candidate's technical skills
                  behavioral_assessment:
                    type: string
                    description: Assessment of the candidate's behavioral traits
                  strengths:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of the candidate's strengths
                  weaknesses:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of the candidate's weaknesses
                  final_recommendation:
                    type: string
                    description: Final recommendation (Hire/No Hire/Maybe)
                  scoring_breakdown:
                    type: object
                    description: Detailed breakdown of the candidate's scores
                    properties:
                      technical_score:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Overall technical score
                      behavioral_score:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Overall behavioral score
                      overall_score:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Overall score
                    example:
                      technical_score: 0.8
                      behavioral_score: 0.9
                      overall_score: 0.85
                example:
                  resume_job_match_analysis: "The candidate's resume closely matches the job description, with strong skills in Python and Javascript."
                  interview_summary: "The candidate performed well in the interview, demonstrating strong technical knowledge and communication skills."
                  technical_assessment: "The candidate has a solid understanding of software engineering principles and is proficient in Python and Javascript."
                  behavioral_assessment: "The candidate is a good communicator and works well in a team environment."
                  strengths: ["Technical Skills", "Communication", "Problem Solving"]
                  weaknesses: ["Lack of experience with AWS"]
                  final_recommendation: "Hire"
                  scoring_breakdown:
                    technical_score: 0.8
                    behavioral_score: 0.9

```python
import math

def calculate_relevance_score(response, expected_answer, job_description):
    """
    Calculates a relevance score based on the presence of keywords
    from the expected answer and job description in the candidate's response.

    Args:
        response (str): The candidate's response.
        expected_answer (str): The expected answer to the question.
        job_description (str): The job description.

    Returns:
        float: The relevance score (0.0 to 1.0).
    """
    response_keywords = set(response.lower().split())
    expected_keywords = set(expected_answer.lower().split())
    job_keywords = set(job_description.lower().split())

    relevant_keywords = expected_keywords.union(job_keywords)

    common_keywords = response_keywords.intersection(relevant_keywords)

    relevance_score = len(common_keywords) / max(1, len(relevant_keywords))
    return relevance_score


def calculate_depth_score(response, expected_answer):
    """
    Calculates a depth score based on the length and complexity
    of the candidate's response compared to the expected answer.

    Args:
        response (str): The candidate's response.
        expected_answer (str): The expected answer to the question.

    Returns:
        float: The depth score (0.0 to 1.0).
    """
    response_length = len(response.split())
    expected_length = len(expected_answer.split())

    # Normalize the response length by the expected length
    depth_score = min(1.0, response_length / max(1, expected_length))

    # Apply a sigmoid function to moderate the score
    depth_score = 1 / (1 + math.exp(-5 * (depth_score - 0.5)))

    return depth_score


def calculate_confidence_score(response):
    """
    Calculates a confidence score based on the presence of confident language
    and the absence of hesitant language in the candidate's response.

    Args:
        response (str): The candidate's response.

    Returns:
        float: The confidence score (0.0 to 1.0).
    """
    confident_keywords = ["I am confident", "I know", "I have experience", "definitely", "certainly"]
    hesitant_keywords = ["I think", "I believe", "I'm not sure", "maybe", "possibly"]

    confident_score = sum([1 for keyword in confident_keywords if keyword.lower() in response.lower()])
    hesitant_score = sum([1 for keyword in hesitant_keywords if keyword.lower() in response.lower()])

    confidence_score = (confident_score + 1) / (confident_score + hesitant_score + 2)  # Add small constant to avoid division by zero

    return confidence_score


def calculate_technical_accuracy_score(response, expected_answer):
    """
    Calculates a technical accuracy score based on the correctness
    of the candidate's response compared to the expected answer.
    This is a simplified example and would ideally use a more sophisticated
    method such as semantic similarity analysis.

    Args:
        response (str): The candidate's response.
        expected_answer (str): The expected answer to the question.

    Returns:
        float: The technical accuracy score (0.0 to 1.0).
    """
    response_keywords = set(response.lower().split())
    expected_keywords = set(expected_answer.lower().split())

    correct_keywords = response_keywords.intersection(expected_keywords)

    accuracy_score = len(correct_keywords) / max(1, len(expected_keywords))

    return accuracy_score


def compute_composite_scores(relevance, depth, confidence, technical_accuracy):
    """
    Computes composite scores for different categories based on the
    individual scores.

    Args:
        relevance (float): The relevance score.
        depth (float): The depth score.
        confidence (float): The confidence score.
        technical_accuracy (float): The technical accuracy score.

    Returns:
        dict: A dictionary containing the composite scores for technical skills,
              communication skills, problem-solving, and an overall score.
    """
    technical_skills = (depth + technical_accuracy) / 2.0
    communication_skills = (relevance + confidence) / 2.0
    problem_solving = (relevance + depth + technical_accuracy) / 3.0
    overall_score = (technical_skills + communication_skills + problem_solving) / 3.0

    return {
        "technical_skills": technical_skills,
        "communication_skills": communication_skills,
        "problem_solving": problem_solving,
        "overall_score": overall_score
    }


def evaluate_candidate_response(response, question, expected_answer, job_description):
    """
    Evaluates a candidate's response based on relevance, depth,
    confidence, and technical accuracy, and computes composite scores.

    Args:
        response (str): The candidate's response.
        question (str): The question asked.
        expected_answer (str): The expected answer to the question.
        job_description (str): The job description.

    Returns:
        dict: A dictionary containing the individual scores and composite scores.
    """
    relevance = calculate_relevance_score(response, expected_answer, job_description)
    depth = calculate_depth_score(response, expected_answer)
    confidence = calculate_confidence_score(response)
    technical_accuracy = calculate_technical_accuracy_score(response, expected_answer)

    composite_scores = compute_composite_scores(relevance, depth, confidence, technical_accuracy)

    return {
        "relevance": relevance,
        "depth": depth,
        "confidence": confidence,
        "technical_accuracy": technical_accuracy,
        **composite_scores
    }

if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Example Usage
    response = "I have experience with Python and Javascript and I am confident in my ability to develop and maintain software applications. I think I know SQL."
    question = "Tell me about your experience with Python and Javascript."
    expected_answer = "Experience with Python and Javascript is required."
    job_description = "Software Engineer: Develop and maintain software applications. Experience with Python and Javascript required."

    evaluation_results = evaluate_candidate_response(response, question, expected_answer, job_description)
    print(evaluation_results)
```
